query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: An abstract composition dominated by horizontal streaks and smeared color fields blending green, magenta, white, dark brown, and black tones, with curved and elliptical light shapes floating amid the bands.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred abstract composition where extreme horizontal smearing obliterates any recognizable subject, dissolving forms into flowing streaks of green, magenta, white, dark brown, and black; curved light shapes appear as ghosted remnants amid the intentional blur, leaving only texture and color gesture with no discernible content.
